_field_legend.registered_systems: systems present in source-registry.json (登记数 — DESIGN.md 已收录但未必抽 rule)
_field_legend.extracted_systems: systems with grammar/rules/<name>.yaml (实际可被 B2 检索的系统数)
_field_legend.total_rules: rule count across all extracted_systems plus _generated.yaml
_field_legend.total_systems: [deprecated v1.5.0] alias of registered_systems — readers should use registered_systems / extracted_systems explicitly

notes: 0.6.0 (v1.5.0 skill): rule schema +brand_archetypes (mandatory); checks fixes (spacing.base + brand.chromatic_count semantics); B4 anti-phantom hard constraints; registry auto-sync; tools/rebuild_graph normalized co_occurs; B3 small-library scale-aware fallback.
